cve.title: CVE-2026-53901 - Cerebrate before v1.37 allows mass assignment of record identifiers during object creation
cve.contentSnippet: Cerebrate before version 1.37 contains a mass-assignment vulnerability in the generic CRUD add path. cve.title: CVE-2026-41856 - Spring GraphQL Annotation Detection Vulnerability
cve.contentSnippet: The Spring GraphQL annotation detection mechanism for @Controller data fetchers may not correctly resolve annotations on methods within type hierarchies. This can be an issue if such annotations are used for authorization decisions. When all conditions are met, security annotatio

cve.title: CVE-2026-41700 - Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking in Spring for GraphQL
cve.contentSnippet: Spring for GraphQL applications that have enabled the WebSocket transport are vulnerable to Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking. An attacker can trick an authenticated user into visiting a malicious page, allowing the attacker to execute arbitrary GraphQL operations with the victim's

cve.title: CVE-2026-41699 - Unsafe Deserialization in Spring GraphQL
cve.contentSnippet: Spring for GraphQL applications are vulnerable to Unsafe Deserialization when processing paginated GraphQL queries. An attacker can craft a malicious GraphQL request that can lead to Remote Code Execution when the application exposes a paginated (Connection) field and the classpa

cve.title: CVE-2026-41001 - Predictable Temp Directory in Artemis Auto-configuration
cve.contentSnippet: Spring Boot's ArtemisEmbeddedConfigurationFactory uses a fixed, static path for the embedded Artemis message broker's data directory when no explicit path is configured. A local attacker on the same host can pre-create this predictable directory or place a symlink before the appl

cve.title: CVE-2026-41000 - WSS4J validation does not use configured replay cache
cve.contentSnippet: Wss4jSecurityInterceptor did not consistently wire Apache WSS4J ReplayCache instances into RequestData for validation-time checks. As a result, protections against replay of UsernameToken nonces and creation timestamps, Timestamp elements, and certain SAML one-time-use semantics

cve.title: CVE-2026-40999 - Spring WS SSRF via unvalidated WS-Addressing reply destinations

cve.title: CVE-2026-40998 - Jaxp13 XPath XXE via StreamSource and SAXSource
cve.contentSnippet: Jaxp13XPathTemplate evaluated XPath expressions for StreamSource and SAXSource inputs using a code path that parsed attacker-controlled XML with the JDK's default DocumentBuilderFactory behavior instead of Spring's hardened parser configuration. Applications that evaluate XPath a

cve.title: CVE-2026-40997 - SOAP security faults leak Spring Security account state
cve.contentSnippet: Several Spring WS integration paths with Spring Security could surface detailed account state (for example locked or disabled user semantics) to remote SOAP clients through exception messages or callback outcomes, instead of failing with generic authentication errors. That behavi

cve.title: CVE-2026-40996 - Inbound WS-Security allows RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 key transport by default
cve.contentSnippet: Wss4jSecurityInterceptor defaulted allowRSA15KeyTransportAlgorithm to true, overriding Apache WSS4J's safer default for validation RequestData. Inbound WS-Security decryption could therefore accept RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 (rsa-1_5) encrypted key material unless operators explicitly recon

cve.title: CVE-2026-40995 - X.509 authentication bypasses Spring Security account checks
cve.contentSnippet: X509AuthenticationProvider could issue a fully authenticated X509AuthenticationToken when a presented certificate mapped to UserDetails, without applying Spring Security's standard account lifecycle checks (disabled, locked, expired, or credentials-expired accounts). Affected ver

cve.title: CVE-2026-40994 - Wss4jSecurityInterceptor disables WS-I BSP validation by default
cve.contentSnippet: Wss4jSecurityInterceptor initialized its BSP (WS-I Basic Security Profile) compliance flag so that inbound validation disabled WSS4J BSP enforcement on RequestData. Services that validate WS-Security on the network could therefore accept messages that violate BSP rules, weakening

cve.title: CVE-2026-40992 - Mail Auto-Configuration Does Not Enable SSL Hostname Verification
cve.contentSnippet: Spring Boot's Mail auto-configuration does not enable hostname verification. Applications that set the relevant JavaMail property, such as spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.ssl.checkserveridentity=true, are not affected. Affected versions: Spring Boot 4.0.0 through 4.0.6; 3.5.0 th

cve.title: CVE-2026-40987 - Remote-file synchronizer in Spring Integration writes server-supplied filename under localDirectory without canonicalization
cve.contentSnippet: A malicious or compromised FTP/SFTP/SMB server can write arbitrary files anywhere on the client filesystem (outside the configured local-directory) with attacker-controlled content. Affected versions: Spring Integration 7.0.0 through 7.0.4; 6.5.0 through 6.5.8; 6.4.0 through 6.4.

cve.title: CVE-2026-40986 - Spring Web Flow JS RemotingHandler renders non-HTML Response as HTML

cve.title: CVE-2026-53465 - ImageMagick: Heap Buffer Over-Write in SF3 encoder when writing multi-frame image
cve.contentSnippet: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-25, a crafted multi-frame can result in a heap buffer over-write when encoding it with the SF3 encoder. This issue has been patched in version 7.1.2-25.

cve.title: CVE-2026-53464 - ImageMagick: Memory Leak in wand option parser when providing invalid arguments
cve.contentSnippet: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to version 7.1.2-25, when providing invalid options to the wand option parser a small memory leak will occur. This issue has been patched in version 7.1.2-25.

cve.title: CVE-2026-53463 - ImageMagick: Null Pointer Dereference in distort operation when passing incorrect arguments
cve.contentSnippet: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images.
